# NSPreferencePaneUnselectReply.unselectLater

**Case**

Delay the deselection until the preference pane invokes [doc://com.apple.preferencepanes/documentation/PreferencePanes/NSPreferencePane/reply(toShouldUnselect:)].

## Declaration

```swift
case unselectLater
```

## Replies

- **NSPreferencePaneUnselectReply.unselectCancel**: Cancel the deselection.
- **NSPreferencePaneUnselectReply.unselectNow**: Continue the deselection.
